posts.raw_content:
How can you respond to a person who will tell you, 'I don't believe in God or the Bible?’

ANSWER:  It is impossible for a non- believer to understand the Bible. 

1 Corinthians 2:14, “ But the natural man receives not the things of the Spirit of God: for they are foolishness unto him: neither can he know them, because they are spiritually discerned.”

Ephesians 2:1-7, And you has he quickened (made spiritually alive), who were dead in trespasses and sins; 2  Wherein in time past you walked (lived) according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of disobedience: 3 Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others. 4 But God, who is rich in mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us, 5 Even when we were dead in sins, hath quickened (made us SPIRITUALLY ALIVE) us together with Christ, (bo grace ye are saved;) . . 7 That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding riches of his grace in his kindness toward us through Christ Jesus. “


1.  To begin with, it is important for the person to understand that everyone is born spiritually bereft of the life of God.  We are BORN spiritually DEAD. (John 3:6-7, “That which is born of the flesh is flesh; and that which is born of the Spirit is spirit. 7 Marvel not that I said unto you, You must be born again.”)

When someone tells me that the things of God are foolishness, that they do not believe in the Bible, i.e., they do not / cannot understand the things of God .. I merely inform them that feeling that way is PERFECTLY NATURAL.  That it is the only way they can feel.

Romans 8:5-8,  "For they that are after the flesh do mind the things of the flesh; but they that are after the Spirit the things of the Spirit.  6 For to be carnally minded is death; but to be spiritually minded is life and peace.  7  Because the carnal mind is enmity [ the enemy of ]  against God: for it is not subject to the law of God, neither indeed can be.  8  So then they that are in the flesh cannot please God."  Ouch!  This always captures their attention,  FAST!
DEAD PEOPLE NEED LIFE:   Ephesians 2:1,  "And you has he quickened, [made alive] who were dead in trespasses and sins."
Attempting to share the things of God with a natural person is like walking into a morgue and preaching to the cadavers.  
1 Corinthians 2:7-14,  "But we speak the wisdom of God in a mystery, even the hidden wisdom, which God ordained before the world unto our glory:  8  Which none of the princes of this world knew: for had they known it, they would not have crucified the Lord of glory.  9  But as it is written, Eye hath not seen, nor ear heard, neither have entered into the heart of man, the things which God has prepared for them that love him.  10  But God has revealed them unto us by his Spirit: for the Spirit searchs all things, yea, the deep things of God.  11  For what man knows the things of a man, save the spirit of man which is in him? even so the things of God knows no man, but the Spirit of God.  12  Now we have received, not the spirit of the world, but the spirit which is of God; that we might know the things that are freely given to us of God.  13  Which things also we speak, not in the words which man's wisdom teachs, but which the Holy Ghost teachs; comparing spiritual things wit!
 h spiritual.  14  But the natural man receives not the things of the Spirit of God: for they are foolishness unto him: neither can he know them, because they are spiritually discerned. [ they are to be understood spiritually ]"  
Every single person of the ”unbelief family” that I have shared this with ... was speechless .. and by the grace of God, have understood WHY they could not understand.  Then they exclaim to me,  "John, that is the VERY FIRST TIME I HAVE EVER UNDERSTOOD ANYTHING THAT I HAVE READ IN THE BIBLE."  The thing is, almost everyone God brings to me,  without failure, informs me that they have tried to read the Bible and have not been able to understand what they were reading.  When I place a Bible before them, they read these very verses, and COMPLETELY UNDERSTAND WHY!  To the glory of God.
Then of course, I share John 6:44 with them,  "No man can come to me, except the Father which has sent me draw him: and I will raise him up at the last day."
One more passage of Scripture that is important to understand is contained in the Gospel of John 1:12-13,  "But as many as received him, to them gave he power to become the sons of God, even to them that believe on his name:  13  Which were born, not of blood [ not because your parents were part of the body of Christ ], nor of the will of the flesh [ not because you woke up one day and thought to yourself, I think I'll become a Christian today, the Father HAS GOT to draw you to His Son Jesus Christ! ] , nor of the will of man [ not becau

How can you respond to a person who will tell you, 'I don't believe in God or the Bible?’

ANSWER: It is impossible for a non- believer to understand the Bible.

1 Corinthians 2:14, “ But the natural man receives not the things of the Spirit of God: for they are foolishness unto him: neither can he know them, because they are spiritually discerned.”

Ephesians 2:1-7, And you has he quickened (made spiritually alive), who were dead in trespasses and sins; 2 Wherein in time past you walked (lived) according to the course of this world, according to the prince of the power of the air, the spirit that now worketh in the children of disobedience: 3 Among whom also we all had our conversation in times past in the lusts of our flesh, fulfilling the desires of the flesh and of the mind; and were by nature the children of wrath, even as others. 4 But God, who is rich in mercy, for his great love wherewith he loved us, 5 Even when we were dead in sins, hath quickened (made us SPIRITUALLY ALIVE) us together with Christ, (bo grace ye are saved;) . . 7 That in the ages to come he might shew the exceeding riches of his grace in his kindness toward us through Christ Jesus. “

(John 3:6-7, “That which is born of the flesh is flesh; and that which is born of the Spirit is spirit. 7 Marvel not that I said unto you, You must be born again.”)

When someone tells me that the things of God are foolishness, that they do not believe in the Bible, i.e., they do not / cannot understand the things of God .. I merely inform them that feeling that way is PERFECTLY NATURAL. That it is the only way they can feel.

h spiritual. 14 But the natural man receives not the things of the Spirit of God: for they are foolishness unto him: neither can he know them, because they are spiritually discerned. [ they are to be understood spiritually ]"
Every single person of the ”unbelief family” that I have shared this with ... was speechless .. and by the grace of God, have understood WHY they could not understand. Then they exclaim to me, "John, that is the VERY FIRST TIME I HAVE EVER UNDERSTOOD ANYTHING THAT I HAVE READ IN THE BIBLE." The thing is, almost everyone God brings to me, without failure, informs me that they have tried to read the Bible and have not been able to understand what they were reading. When I place a Bible before them, they read these very verses, and COMPLETELY UNDERSTAND WHY! To the glory of God.
